title: Briful 23.5cm Tall Glass Vase Decorative Flower Vase Made of Glass with Star-shaped Base, Clear Crystal Flower Vases for Table Minimalist Fluted Vases for Wedding, Windowsill Decoration
features: MODERN & TIMELESS DESIGN: With its unusual design, the transparent table vase made of Briful is a highlight in your home. It sets stylish accents on your holiday table. It can also be placed as an elegant decorative element on the side table or chest of drawers.

HIGH-QUALITY WORKMANSHIP: The fluted flower vase is made from premium quality, transparent glass. In addition, the star-shaped bottom and edge are slightly thickened to ensure even more stability. The decorative vase has a polygonal basic shape and impresses with its grooved surface.

PRODUCT DETAILS: 23.5cm x Ø 7.5cm(Top) x Ø 10.5cm(Bottom). 2 colours available: Amber, Transperant. Thanks to the high-quality, transparent glass, this vase can be decorated with almost anything. Order several vases and give each one its own look.

VERSATILE APPLICATION: The table decoration has many uses: for fresh flowers, bouquets, dried flowers, candles or as a tea light holder. Atmospheric decoration in the living room, winter garden, kitchen, bedroom, office, bathroom on windowsill, sideboard, chest of drawers, shelf, dining table, mantelpiece | Table decoration.

UNIVERSAL GIFT: Thanks to the modern and timeless design, this glass vase is a universal gift for young or old. Give joy! Unique gift for birthdays, weddings, Christmas, Easter, Mother's Day, Valentine's Day, housewarming | for loved ones, family, friends | at Christmas time or all year round.
